title: Method for generating a radiation image of a region of interest of an object
abstract: A region of interest first displayed on a model image of the object, is mapped onto corresponding location on the object defined relative to determined locations of predefined features. A source of radiation is set so that the region of interest on the object, is irradiated.
claims:
Claims [CLAIMS] 1. A method of recording an actual radiation image of a region of interest of an object comprising the steps of defining said region of interest relative to a model image of the object and displaying it on said model image, determining the location of predefined features on said object on an actual image of at least part of said object in an image recording position, mapping onto the actual image of the patient positioned in the image recording position the region of interest corresponding with the region of interest displayed on said model image, on the basis of the determined locations, adjusting a source of radiation so that it emits radiation within said region of interest and generates a radiation image of said region of interest, detecting said radiation image by means of a radiation detector, reading out the radiation image stored in said radiation detector . 2. A method according to claim 1 wherein said model image is a 3D model image. 3. A method according to claim 1 wherein borders of said region of interest are displayed on the model image. 4. A method according to claim 1 wherein displayed borders on the model image are adjustable. 5. A method according to claim 1 wherein said region of interest represents a part of a long length image and wherein a partial radiation image is generated by irradiating said region of interest . 

A method according to claim 1 wherein said object patient .
